items.title: Broken object level authorization (BOLA/IDOR)
items.desc: Swap object IDs across users and roles; test horizontal and vertical access.

items.title: JWT validation flaws
items.desc: alg:none, weak secrets, missing exp/aud, and key confusion attacks.

items.title: OAuth misconfiguration
items.desc: Redirect URI validation, state parameter, and scope escalation.

items.title: API key exposure
items.desc: Keys not in client bundles, logs, or referrer headers.

items.title: Mass assignment
items.desc: Extra JSON fields like role:admin accepted by backend.

items.title: Rate limiting and brute force
items.desc: OTP, login, and password reset endpoints throttled.

items.title: GraphQL introspection and depth limits
items.desc: Disable introspection in prod; limit query depth and cost.

items.title: Version sprawl
items.desc: Old /api/v1 endpoints not left live with weaker auth.

items.title: Error message leakage
items.desc: Stack traces and internal IDs not returned to clients.
